command: rg -n "iOS|iPhone|TestFlight|Mail|Messages|Full Access|public iOS|works everywhere|arbitrary app|App Store|keyboard" site README.md docs/superpowers 2>/dev/null || true

summary.landing_page: Contains bounded iPhone preview copy: closed internal beta, custom keyboard, Allow Full Access, verified Notes/Safari/Messages draft rows, Mail deferred, secure-field caveat, and no public App Store claim.
summary.comparison_blogs: Foil iOS references now describe a closed iPhone preview and verified host-app rows only; competitor public iOS references remain comparison context.
summary.legacy_docs: Remaining keyboard hits under docs/superpowers are macOS keyboard-event design notes, not public iOS availability claims.

strongest_failure_checked: Broad or public iOS support overclaim in public-site copy.
